filter.note: duplicate_code retained unchanged because file_path values are empty in source report

sast.title: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
sast.description: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

sast.title: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
sast.description: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

sast.title: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
sast.description: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

sast_false_positives.title: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
sast_false_positives.description: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
sast_false_positives.false_positive_reasoning: The user-controlled SSID is HTML-escaped with escHtml() before being inserted, so the reported XSS is not present.

sast_false_positives.title: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
sast_false_positives.description: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
sast_false_positives.false_positive_reasoning: All dynamic review content is HTML-escaped with escHtml() before innerHTML assignment, so there is no XSS sink here.

sast_false_positives.title: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
sast_false_positives.description: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
sast_false_positives.false_positive_reasoning: The only user-controlled value in the handoff message is escaped with escHtml(), so the innerHTML usage is safe here.

sast_false_positives.title: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
sast_false_positives.description: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
sast_false_positives.false_positive_reasoning: The untrusted SSID is HTML-escaped via textContent before being inserted into innerHTML, so no XSS sink is exposed.

sast_false_positives.title: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
sast_false_positives.description: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
sast_false_positives.false_positive_reasoning: The rendered device fields are numeric telemetry formatted for display, with no concrete evidence of attacker-controlled markup reaching the sink.

sast_false_positives.title: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
sast_false_positives.description: User controlled data in methods like `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` or `document.write` is an anti-pattern that can lead to XSS vulnerabilities
cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
sast_false_positives.false_positive_reasoning: The flight panel only renders numeric status metrics, so there is no evidence of exploitable HTML injection.
